blocks.label: Pre-Congress Workshop
blocks.title: Paediatric Imaging: Current Practice and Future Trends
blocks.note: Detailed programme will be shared in due course.

blocks.label: Inauguration Ceremony
blocks.title: Inauguration Ceremony
blocks.highlight: Dr. S N B Talwatte Memorial Oration
paragraphs: The inauguration marks the opening ceremony of the Annual Academic Sessions 2026.

It boasts the years-old traditions and formalities of the SLCR, with a ceremonial procession, the President's speech, speeches by the Chief Guest and Guest of Honour, and the awarding of gold medals and fellowships.
Commencing at 6:00 PM, the evening will progress into the night and conclude with a formal dinner for the academic faculty, SLCR council, SLCR members and all distinguished invitees.
